prompt:
Use case: brand promise beat
Primary request: Make the core promise feel bold and uncompromising through giant typography and severe structure. No people, no logos, no extra claims.
Scene/background: black field with off-white slabs and burnt orange bars creating a severe stage for giant kinetic type
Subject: the firm's core promise
Action: beat 1 (0-1s) type fragments enter; beat 2 (1-3s) the full phrase locks into place with subtle parallax; beat 3 (3-4s) burnt orange emphasis lands on the middle phrase
Camera: mostly locked-off with slight depth motion
Lighting/mood: confrontational, crisp, premium
Color palette: black, off-white, burnt orange
Style/format: typography-first brand film
Audio: low bass thump, restrained metallic accents
Text (verbatim): "WE FIX WHAT'S BROKEN. THEN WE LEAVE."
Constraints: exact wording; large legible typography; no extra claims
Avoid: warped text, decorative fonts, excess particles
